name: Berkshire Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour once, then measure and add baking powder, salt, cinnamon, cloves, and mace. Sift together three times.
2. Cream butter thoroughly until smooth. Gradually add sugar, creaming until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Mix in raisins, currants, citron slices, grape juice, and molasses.
5. Gradually blend in flour mixture until smooth.
6. Pour batter into a greased tube pan lined with heavy paper. Turn off heat.
7. Bake in a very slow oven (250°F) for 4-1/2 hours or until done. Makes 5 1/2 pounds fruit cake.
